reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar y más cerca que los otros en la zona para un socio del aca

(Translated by Google)
Very good place and closer than the others in the area for a member of the aca
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTM2ZuWmtBRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención de los playeros es muy lenta parece que trabajan a desgano, les pido que llenen el tanque y apenas corta la manguera del surtidor no se molestan en completarlo el tanque. Cargo porque soy socio y corresponde que atiendan rápido y eficientemente, es la única estación del ACA trabajan en cámara lenta, es una pena.

(Translated by Google)
The service from the gas station attendants is incredibly slow; they seem to be working reluctantly. I ask them to fill my tank, and as soon as the pump shuts off, they don't even bother to top it up. I only fill up because I'm a member, and they should be quick and efficient. It's the only ACA station here; they work at a snail's pace. It's a shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTemEyYlJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Practicamenye una estacion de servicio, pocos servicios generales para los socios.....

(Translated by Google)
It's practically a gas station, with few general services for members...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTLWFXZFhBEAE

reviews.comment:
Mi auto puede responder por mi: "Buena atención, me miman, me limpian los vidrios y llenan el tanque del fluido que tanto necesito para andar".

(Translated by Google)
My car can vouch for me: "Great service, they pamper me, they clean my windows and fill the tank with the fluid I need to keep going."
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTNmJ2anVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los empleados bastantes, mal predispuestos y mala atención.

(Translated by Google)
There were quite a few employees, they were unhelpful and provided poor service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTN3NhRlh3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena, destaco la limpieza y belleza de ésta estación por encima de las de su marca. Buena y rápida atención.
En cuanto a precios es igual que las demás, nada para destacar.

(Translated by Google)
Very good. I'd highlight the cleanliness and beauty of this station above others of its brand. Good and fast service.
Prices are the same as the others, nothing special.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTNnFIdWR3EAE
